title: rosa × waitziana var. transmota
intro: Rosa × waitziana var. transmota, also known as Damask rose or Rose de Mai, is a fragrant and beautiful rose plant that is a hybrid of Rosa × damascena. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rosa × waitziana var. transmota include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other women's health issues. The herbal preparations of Rosa × waitziana var. transmota include rose oil, which is often used in aromatherapy, and rose petal tea, which is consumed to promote relaxation and calmness.
